title: A godly man doesn't need a witness
caption:
A godly man doesn't need a witness.

Discipline that only shows up with an audience isn't discipline. It's performance.

The scroll at midnight. The second plate. The snooze button. None of it makes you weak. Feeding it does.

Self-control isn't something you grit your way to. Galatians calls it fruit of the Spirit for a reason. You don't manufacture it. You abide your way to it, one kept promise at a time.

Pick one thing this week that only you and God will know if you broke. Keep it.

Galatians 5:22-23: "the fruit of the Spirit is... self-control."

Save this for the morning after you didn't.

#faith #discipline #selfcontrol #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #christianity
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
